# statusgator_custom_monitor (Resource)

Manages a StatusGator custom monitor with manually-controlled status.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Custom monitor with manual status control
resource "statusgator_custom_monitor" "deployment" {
  board_id    = "my-board-id"
  name        = "Deployment Pipeline"
  description = "Status of the CI/CD deployment pipeline"
  status      = "up"
}

# Custom monitor in a group
resource "statusgator_custom_monitor" "batch_jobs" {
  board_id    = "my-board-id"
  name        = "Nightly Batch Jobs"
  description = "Status of nightly data processing jobs"
  status      = "up"
  group_id    = statusgator_monitor_group.infrastructure.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `board_id` (String) The ID of the board this monitor belongs to.
- `name` (String) The name of the monitor.
- `status` (String) Status of the monitor: up, warn, or down.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the monitor.
- `group_id` (String) The ID of the monitor group this monitor belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the monitor.
